claim: A two-component finite integer vector/operator summation-by-parts identity type-checks in Lean, but it does not prove smooth periodic integration by parts or Navier-Stokes.
scope: Project Telos twentieth-wave prooflesson for finite vector/operator replay boundaries
decision_summary: Lean compilation establishes the finite theorem within the stated scope. The packet explicitly excludes smooth PDE and Navier-Stokes claims.
